other_observers: Mark Peterson, Bill Maynard, Rachel Hopper, Bill Schmoker, many others.; Found by Mark Miller.
specific_location: Lefthand Creek, in Longmont, off Pike Street.
description: A waterthrush, with bright white eyeline, flaring in the back. Brownish on the upper parts, head, back, and tail. Bright white throat, breast, belly, with cinnamon colored flanks, with some streaking on the sides. Bright pink legs, large thin warbler like bill. The tail pumping was in a U shape, not up and down like Northern Waterthrush. See my lousy photos.Behaviors: Feeding along the moving stream, catching insects.Call: nonePlumage: adult
photographer: Photographer: Brandon K Percival, Brandon K Percival
